title: Japanese Language Pack for Create Aeronautics
description:
Create Aeronautics Modの日本語化パック
This is a Japanese Translation patch for Create Aeronautics.
body:
# **About**
### **Create Aeronautics Modの非公式日本語化パック**

⚠️追記：新しいバージョンのCreate Aeronauticsで公式が日本語対応しました⚠️
_新バージョンではこのパックは必要ありません_

**Create Aeronauticsのアイテム、説明文、思案画面などを翻訳します**

**Japanese Translation Mod for Create Aeronautics**

Translates item names, descriptions, and Ponder screens of Create Aeronautics into Japanese.

![Physics Assembler(物理アセンブラー)の思案画面が翻訳されている例](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af36ba999df4e20076ddc84965fea528cee8e54.png)
# **Dependencies 依存関係**
## Create Aeronauticsが導入されている必要があります❗ Requires Create Aeronautics to be installed.
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)

## ⚠️Important Notes 注意事項
**言語設定から言語を日本語にしていないと動作しません**

**This mod will not function unless the in-game language is set to Japanese.**

## Credits and License
- The original English language files and assets are owned by The Simulated Team / The Creators of Aeronautics.
- This Japanese translation is a fan-made patch and is distributed as an independent resource.
- This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by The Simulated Team.
- The original mod "Create Aeronautics" is licensed under its own terms (MIT for code, All Rights Reserved for assets).
